baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review this dependency update for security and CI implications.
evals.expected_output: A dependency-security review that checks lockfile changes, audit results, provenance, and CI impact.
assertions: Runs or recommends the repo's audit/security checks.
Flags install script, provenance, or secret-handling risks.
Keeps unrelated dependency churn out of scope.
